title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.460 - Tenants liable to cotenants, when
text:
537.460.  Tenants liable to cotenants, when. — If a tenant in common, joint tenant or parcener commit waste, he shall be liable to his cotenants, jointly or severally, for damages.
(RSMo 1939 § 3007) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2620; 1919 § 6914; 1909 § 7917
